libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: For native test runtime, set system properties `-Dsun.misc.unsafe.memory.access=allow` and `-Dio.netty.tryReflectionSetAccessible=true` for `io.vertx:vertx-web-client:5.0.1` as well as the existing 5.0.0 case. Keep tests self-contained with an in-process Vert.x HTTP server; no external service is required.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #7998 [Automation] native-image run fails for io.vertx:vertx-web-client:5.0.1; label=fails-native-image-run; body_chars=8015

risks: Vert.x Web Client includes optional OAuth2-specific APIs backed by `io.vertx:vertx-auth-oauth2`; only add that dependency if tests deliberately cover `OAuth2WebClient`.

The reported failure shows Netty `PlatformDependent0.safeConstructPutInt` NPE/connection resets in native runtime, so Gradle/native-image verification remains necessary to confirm the system properties are sufficient on the local toolchain.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: The artifact resolves to Vert.x 5.0.1 with Netty 4.2.2.Final transitives; meaningful local HTTP WebClient coverage does not need extra Maven dependencies or Docker, but Java 25/native runs need Netty unsafe/reflection system properties.
